creator: ww@mainlink.de
text:
This is a request to add my company to your "FreeBSD offering ISPs" list. Suggested description:

***
Mainlink is a Frankfurt/Germany based ISP offering root servers running FreeBSD and other *BSD flavours. Managing options, KVM-over-IP access, plain webspace, spam-protected email services etc. available. Foreign customers are welcome.

http://mainlink.de
***

Thank you. Best regards,
Wolfgang Wuest
